caption: A man with a beard, wearing a white t-shirt and black headphones, is seated in a studio with a dark, textured acoustic foam wall. He is positioned in front of a silver microphone attached to a shock mount. He has tattoos on his right arm and a small logo reading "Draft" on the left side of his chest. Across the sequence, the man is speaking and reacting with various facial expressions. He begins with an open-mouthed, surprised expression, then transitions to a slight smile with his eyes partially closed. He then appears to be laughing or talking with a wide smile, and finally settles into a happy, open-mouthed expression while looking slightly to his right. The setting and equipment remain static as the man shifts his head position and facial expressions while speaking into the microphone.
